message:
feat(abi,core): add legacy GNU regex API shims and expand regex engine

Implement the legacy POSIX.2 / GNU regex API surface (re_compile_pattern,
re_search, re_match, re_set_syntax, regfree for legacy buffers) in the
string ABI layer, backed by new binary-safe regex_compile_bytes() and
regex_exec_slice() entry points in frankenlibc-core.

Key changes:
- Add RegexBufferLayout, RegexHandle, and LegacyReRegisters repr(C)
  structs matching glibc's in-memory layout for regex_t / re_registers
- Translate legacy GNU syntax bitmasks to POSIX cflags via
  legacy_regex_syntax_to_cflags()
- Add regex_compile_bytes() that accepts explicit-length patterns without
  NUL truncation (required by re_compile_pattern's contract)
- Add regex_exec_slice() for substring matching with start offset
- Expose CompiledRegex::num_regs() and nosub() accessors
- Comprehensive ABI-level tests for legacy regex round-trips

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
